storylets.title: {=patron_audience_title}{PATRON_NAME} arranges a door
storylets.setup: {=patron_audience_setup}{PATRON_NAME} listens, fingers laced. "An audience. Yes. Easier asked than given. Whose hall would you stand in. A peer of mine? A rival? Tell me which kind of meeting you want, and I will pick the man."

options.text: {=patron_audience_ally}A peer in your circle. Someone who would receive me kindly.
options.tooltip: {=patron_audience_ally_tt}Patron arranges a friendly audience. +5 renown, +3 relation seed for next encounter with target.

options.text: {=patron_audience_rival}A rival of yours, lord. I would learn the other side.
options.tooltip: {=patron_audience_rival_tt}Patron writes a cooler introduction. -2 patron relation. +1 calculating. Insight is the trade.

options.text: {=patron_audience_withdraw}I have spoken too quickly. Forget the request, lord.
options.tooltip: {=patron_audience_withdraw_tt}+3 relation. He sets the matter aside without comment.
